settling.observation: sanitized getLayoutInfo + getAgentChatState + getLayoutInfo atomic bracket

components.name: Window
components.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

components.name: MainViewHeader
components.explanation: Height = padding(4) + content(50) + padding(4) = 58px. Uses shared no-divider main-view header chrome.

components.name: MainViewContextZone
components.explanation: Three-zone launcher context row: cwd/Tab and agent-model/Shift+Tab live above the query input.

components.name: MainViewInput
components.explanation: Shared main-view input fills the header width. Width = window(750) - horizontal padding(2 * 2) = 746px.

components.name: MainViewMain
components.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining height after header. Uses flex-row to create side-by-side panels.

components.name: MainViewFooter
components.explanation: Floating hint-strip footer overlay for Base Info Bar. Side inset 14px; inter-item gap 2px; button radius 6px.

components.name: AgentChatTranscript
components.explanation: Agent Chat transcript viewport for 21 live thread messages; bounds come from the transcript ListState viewport.
